name: Broco Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb mushrooms (I used a mix of oyster and normal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion, garlic, mushrooms, leeks, and broccoli.
2. Fry the chopped onion and garlic in a little water until tender.
3. Add the mushrooms, vegetable stock, salt, pepper, and sage to the pan. Simmer until the mushrooms have reduced.
4. In a blender, combine the chopped broccoli stalks, kidney beans, chopped leeks, and soya milk or tofu. Blend until smooth, adding water if needed.
5. Stir the blended mixture into the mushroom sauce.
6. Add the broccoli florets and any additional water to achieve a creamy consistency. Simmer until the florets have softened.
7. Serve over pasta twirls. For this occasion, I used Orgran's Barley and Spinach (wheat-free) pasta.
